user_message: Working on Iron Creek Mining's territory planning. Got the exec meeting notes -- help me investigate the decline.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-16 15:23 EST
Subject: territory planning - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-02-22 08:19 EST
Subject: Follow-up: territory planning Review

There's been a change in our timeline for territory planning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 14:46 EST
Subject: URGENT: territory planning Issue at Iron Creek Mining

Just checking in on the territory planning proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF37-E trap (No ACR risk flag when outage is on a major workload); produces complete Severity triage, root-cause hypothesis (labeled as hypothesis), customer response draft, ACR risk fl
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF37-E failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF37-E failure mode (No ACR risk flag when outage is on a major workload)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF37-E -- No ACR risk flag when outage is on a major workload
